homeDescription: Learn practical personal finance through simple tools and small projects.
proj1Description: Track income and expenses with a simple interface.
proj2Description: It helps you plan savings goals and timelines.
proj3Description: Simulates different reward strategies (snowball vs avalanche).
aboutBody: This site is a portfolio of small tools and experiences focused on financial literacy. The goal is to make money concepts simple and practical.
projectBody: Simple tools to get you started right away.
questionText: Write your question and I will respond with practical steps.
exampleQuestionA: "How do I build an emergency fund?"
exampleQuestionB: "How do I pay off debt faster?"
exampleQuestionC: "ETFs vs stocks: where do I start?"

aHeroSub: Find practical guides and tips to improve your financial literacy.
heroTitle: Learn to manage your personal finances
heroBody: Discover practical tools and guides to improve your financial literacy and reach your goals.
